_comment: WorldForge races.json — definieert alle spelbare rassen en hun eigenschappen. Vervangt losse Rollable Tables voor ras-specifieke data. Formaat: nl|en voor tweetalige velden.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.description: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.description: You gain the Alert, Skilled, or Tough feat, or another 1st-level feat of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.description: You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities. Choose a lineage: Drow, High Elf, or Wood Elf. You gain the spells and traits associated with that lineage.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Insight, Perception, or Survival skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 120 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition. You also have Resistance to Poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you gain Tremorsense with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes. You must be on a stone surface or touching a stone surface to use this Tremorsense. The stone can be natural or worked. You can use this Bonus Action a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 120 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.description: When you score a Critical Hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the Critical Hit.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.description: You are part of a lineage that grants you supernatural abilities. Choose a lineage: Forest Gnome or Rock Gnome. You gain the spells and traits associated with that lineage.

en: slightly reddish or purplish skin tones

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.description: You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities. Choose a legacy: Abyssal, Chthonic, or Infernal. You gain the spells and traits associated with that legacy.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

hairColors._comment: Dragonborn have no hair — scale color is used instead

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Your lineage stems from a dragon progenitor. Choose the kind of dragon from the Draconic Ancestry table. Your Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance are determined by the dragon type chosen.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (your choice). Each creature in that area must make a saving throw (DC = 8 + your Constitution modifier + your Proficiency Bonus). The type of saving throw and damage depend on your Draconic Ancestry. This trait can be used a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and all expended uses are regained when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.description: When you reach character level 5, you can channel draconic magic to give yourself temporary flight. As a Bonus Action, you sprout spectral wings on your back, gaining a Fly Speed equal to your Speed and lasting until the start of your next turn. You can use this Bonus Action a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to Necrotic damage and Radiant damage.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.description: As a Magic action, you can touch a creature and roll a number of d4s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains a number of Hit Points equal to the total rolled. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation
traits.description: When you reach character level 3, you can transform as a Bonus Action using one of the following options (choose whenever you use this trait): Heavenly Wings, Inner Radiance, or Necrotic Shroud. Each option lasts for 1 minute or until you end it (no action required). Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

hairColors._comment: Tabaxi have fur patterns rather than hair

traits.name: Cat's Claws
traits.description: You have a Climb Speed equal to your Speed. In addition, your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make Unarmed Strikes. When you hit with them, the strike deals 1d6 + your Strength modifier Slashing damage instead of the Bludgeoning damage normal for an Unarmed Strike.

traits.name: Cat's Talent
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception and Stealth skills.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of yourself as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Feline Agility
traits.description: Your reflexes and agility allow you to move with a burst of speed. When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your Speed until the end of the turn. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

hairColors._comment: Goliaths have no hair — skin patterns are used instead

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.description: You are descended from Giants. Choose one of the following benefits, which reflects the Giant in your ancestry: Cloud's Jaunt (Cloud Giant), Fire's Burn (Fire Giant), Frost's Chill (Frost Giant), Hill's Tumble (Hill Giant), Stone's Endurance (Stone Giant), Storm's Thunder (Storm Giant).

traits.name: Large Form
traits.description: Starting at character level 5, you can change your size to Large as a Bonus Action if you're in a big enough space. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). For that duration, you have Advantage on Strength checks, and your Speed increases by 10 feet. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.
